mysite
Table of Contents

Class PermisoKeys

Namespace
Domain.Composite
Assembly
Domain.dll

Defines the canonical string keys for every permission in the system.

public static class PermisoKeys
Inheritance
object
PermisoKeys
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Each constant maps to the TipoAcceso value stored in the database and is the single source of truth for authorization checks performed by Service.Helpers.PermisoHelper.TienePermiso. Service.Logic.PermisosService.EnsurePermissions uses reflection over this class to auto-provision any missing Patente records on startup.
